title: Dollar Devaluation Does Not Mean Dollar Catastrophe
section_path: Dollar Devaluation Does Not Mean Dollar Catastrophe
section_path_text: Dollar Devaluation Does Not Mean Dollar Catastrophe
summary:
Main
The three things investors need to know this week
We acknowledge that risks are rising as a result of the trade war and higher debt, but we believe that they are manageable as long as we accept that we live in a more volatile world. While the warnings about the US economy are all too real investors and businesses would do well to remember that in this, monetary, world, central banks can absorb a lot of the economic and financial shocks. Currency devaluation is the major course open for the government which faces a rapid debt build-up and wants to reduce its trade deficit.
